===================
=== bd1990-09-01_lampe_info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Swiss Villa Amphitheater, 
Lampe, Missouri, 01/09/90

Disc I:
Marine Hymn (trad.) (instrumental) 
Tangled Up In Blue (with harp)
Ballad Of A Thin Man (with harp)
Silvio (Bob Dylan/Robert Hunter) (with harp)
Masters Of War
I'll Remember You (with harp)
Gotta Serve Somebody
@ Love Minus Zero/No Limit (with harp)
@ Desolation Row
@ Gates Of Eden
@ Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (with harp)	

Disc II: 
Rainy Day Women #12 & 35
I Believe In You
All Along The Watchtower
What Good Am I? (with harp)
I Shall Be Released
Like A Rolling Stone (with harp)
@ Blowin' In The Wind (with harp)
Maggie's Farm


Concert # 225 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 15 of the 1990 Late Summer Tour Of North America. 1990 concert #55. Concert # 147 with the second G. E. Smith band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), G. E. Smith (guitar), Miles Joseph (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Christopher Parker (drums). Miles Joseph is tried out on guitar throughout the show.

Excellent show, from a low generation source (no taper-name known, but not the same as LB-0162) and with great sound. I assume this is the same as LB-4362, from description and disc-split

CD-R from trade, ripped with EAC (secure mode) - straight to FLAC

Front artwork by Piotr Tymstra, back artwork by roberts (me)
===================

===================
